ucs.title: [LLM] VOID MANTICORE wiper file-rename fingerprint (BiBi / Karma / No-Justice / Homeland Justice)
ucs.description: Catches the destructive end-stage of VOID MANTICORE / Handala Hack / Homeland Justice intrusions where files are bulk-renamed with the wiper-specific extensions BiBi<N>, .karma, or where the wiper binaries (BiBi-Windows.exe, BiBi-Linux, No-Justice.exe, Homeland-Justice) are dropped/run on a host. These extensions and names are unique to the MOIS-aligned BANISHED KITTEN / Red Sandstorm cluster's wiper families used against Albanian (2022) and Israeli (2023-2024) targets.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t count dc(Filesystem.file_path) as files_touched min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_name) as sample_files values(Filesystem.process_name) as renamer values(Filesystem.user) as actor from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action IN ("renamed","modified","created") (Filesystem.file_name="*.BiBi*" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.karma" OR Filesystem.file_name="BiBi-Windows.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="BiBi-Linux" OR Filesystem.file_name="No-Justice.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="Homeland*Justice*" OR Filesystem.file_name="RIPMOI*") by Filesystem.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`
| where files_touched >= 25
| convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
| sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// VOID MANTICORE wiper signature — BiBi/Karma/No-Justice/Homeland Justice
let Lookback = 7d;
let WiperBins = dynamic(["BiBi-Windows.exe","BiBi-Linux","No-Justice.exe","Homeland-Justice.exe","Homeland Justice.exe"]);
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
| where ActionType in ("FileRenamed","FileCreated","FileModified")
| where FileName matches regex @"(?i)\.BiBi\d*$"      // canonical BiBi rename — file.docx.BiBi3
   or FileName endswith ".karma"                       // Karma wiper
   or FileName has_any (WiperBins)                      // wiper binaries themselves
   or FolderPath has_any (@"\Homeland Justice\", @"\No-Justice\")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("explorer.exe","backupagent.exe","robocopy.exe")
| summarize
    FilesTouched = dcount(FolderPath),
    FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
    LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
    SampleFiles = make_set(FileName, 25),
    SampleProcesses = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 5),
    SampleSha = make_set(InitiatingProcessSHA256, 5),
    SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| where FilesTouched >= 25
   or array_length(SampleProcesses) > 0 and SampleProcesses has_any (WiperBins)
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// VOID MANTICORE wiper signature — Sentinel ASIM file events
let Lookback = 7d;
let WiperBins = dynamic(["BiBi-Windows.exe","BiBi-Linux","No-Justice.exe","Homeland-Justice.exe","Homeland Justice.exe"]);
ImFileEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where EventType in ("FileRenamed","FileCreated","FileModified")
| where TargetFileName matches regex @"(?i)\.BiBi\d*$"
   or TargetFileName endswith ".karma"
   or TargetFileName has_any (WiperBins)
   or TargetFilePath has_any (@"\Homeland Justice\", @"\No-Justice\")
| where ActingProcessName !in~ ("explorer.exe","backupagent.exe","robocopy.exe")
| summarize
    FilesTouched = dcount(TargetFilePath),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    SampleFiles = make_set(TargetFileName, 25),
    SampleProcesses = make_set(ActingProcessName, 5),
    SampleHash = make_set(TargetFileSHA256, 5)
    by DvcHostname, ActorUsername
| where FilesTouched >= 25
   or SampleProcesses has_any (WiperBins)
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: VOID MANTICORE BiBi / Karma / No-Justice Wiper File Artefacts
id: 7d7e2c36-c1f3-4a55-9e8e-4a8a8a3a6b21
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects wiper file-rename and binary artefacts unique to VOID MANTICORE (G1055 — BANISHED KITTEN / Red Sandstorm / COBALT MYSTIQUE), an Iran MOIS-aligned cluster operating the Handala Hack and Homeland Justice personas. The .BiBi<N> rename pattern, .karma extension, and No-Justice / Homeland Justice binary names are signature artefacts of the wipers used against Israeli (BiBi) and Albanian (Homeland Justice / No-Justice) targets.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2024/bad-karma-no-justice-void-manticore-destructive-activities-in-israel/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa22-264a
  - https://www.security-joes.com/post/bibi-linux-a-new-malware-wipes-files-on-linux-systems
author: Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1485
  - attack.t1486
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1561.001
  - attack.g1055
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  bibi_rename:
    TargetFilename|re: '(?i)\.BiBi[0-9]*$'
  karma_rename:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.karma'
  wiper_binary:
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - 'BiBi-Windows'
      - 'BiBi-Linux'
      - 'No-Justice'
      - 'Homeland-Justice'
      - 'Homeland Justice'
  condition: 1 of bibi_rename or 1 of karma_rename or 1 of wiper_binary
falsepositives:
  - None expected — the .BiBi<N> rename suffix and named binaries are wiper-specific.
level: critical
ucs.rationale: Generic wiper detections key on shadow-copy delete or mass-rename volume; VOID MANTICORE's wipers leave a fingerprint that no commodity wiper or ransomware family reuses: the BiBi<N> numeric suffix on each renamed file, the .karma extension, and the No-Justice / Homeland-Justice binary names tied to MOIS public-facing personas. Hitting on any of those is effectively an attribution-grade signal for

ucs.title: [LLM] VOID MANTICORE GPO-driven wiper distribution via SYSVOL drop + domain-wide fan-out
ucs.description: Hunts the actor's signature mass-deployment chain: after credential theft, VOID MANTICORE / BANISHED KITTEN modifies a Group Policy Object on a DC, drops a wiper / staging script (BiBi, No-Justice, Karma) into SYSVOL\\Policies\\{GUID}\\Machine\\Scripts\\Startup or as a GPP Scheduled Task, then waits for gpupdate / svchost-driven policy refresh to fan it out to every domain-joined endpoint in minutes. The chain (T1078 → T1484.001 → T1485) is the actor's documented Albania (Homeland Justice 2022) and Israeli (Handala 2024) playbook.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as DropTime values(Filesystem.file_name) as DropFiles values(Filesystem.file_path) as DropPaths values(Filesystem.user) as GpoActor from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action IN ("created","modified","renamed") (Filesystem.file_path="*\\SYSVOL\\*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Policies\\{*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Machine\\Scripts\\Startup*" OR Filesystem.file_path="*\\Machine\\Preferences\\ScheduledTasks*") (Filesystem.file_name="*.ps1" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.bat" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.cmd" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="ScheduledTasks.xml" OR Filesystem.file_name="scripts.ini") NOT Filesystem.user="*$" by Filesystem.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`
| rename dest as DC 
| join type=inner [ 
    | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as FirstExec dc(Processes.dest) as AffectedHosts values(Processes.dest) as ExecHosts values(Processes.process_name) as ChildBins values(Processes.process) as ChildCmds from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("svchost.exe","gpscript.exe","taskhostw.exe","services.exe")) (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") OR Processes.process="*BiBi*" OR Processes.process="*No-Justice*" OR Processes.process="*karma*" OR Processes.process="*Homeland*Justice*") 
    | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
    | where AffectedHosts >= 5 
  ] 
| where FirstExec >= DropTime AND FirstExec <= DropTime + 3600 
| table DropTime FirstExec DC GpoActor DropFiles DropPaths AffectedHosts ExecHosts ChildBins ChildCmds 
| sort - DropTime
ucs.kql:
// VOID MANTICORE: SYSVOL/GPO wiper drop -> domain-wide gpupdate fan-out within 60m
let Lookback = 24h;
let WindowMin = 60m;
let SysvolDrops = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
    | where FolderPath has_any (@"\SYSVOL\", @"\Policies\{", @"\Machine\Scripts\", @"\Machine\Preferences\ScheduledTasks")
    | where (FileName endswith ".ps1" or FileName endswith ".bat" or FileName endswith ".cmd"
          or FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName =~ "ScheduledTasks.xml" or FileName =~ "scripts.ini")
    | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DC = DeviceName, GpoActor = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              DropFile = FileName, DropPath = FolderPath, DropSha = InitiatingProcessSHA256,
              DropCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine
    | extend _key = 1;
let FanOut = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("svchost.exe","gpscript.exe","taskhostw.exe","services.exe")
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
         or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("BiBi","No-Justice","karma","Homeland-Justice","Homeland Justice","wiper")
    | project ExecTime = Timestamp, ExecHost = DeviceName, ChildBin = FileName, ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine
    | extend _key = 1;
SysvolDrops
| join kind=inner FanOut on _key
| where ExecTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowMin)
| summarize
    AffectedHosts = dcount(ExecHost),
    FirstExec = min(ExecTime),
    SampleHosts = make_set(ExecHost, 25),
    SampleChildBin = make_set(ChildBin, 5),
    SampleChildCmd = any(ChildCmd)
    by DC, GpoActor, DropFile, DropPath, DropSha, DropTime
| where AffectedHosts >= 5            // 5+ host fan-out within 1h of GPO drop
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// VOID MANTICORE: SYSVOL drop -> domain-wide policy-refresh fan-out (Sentinel ASIM)
let Lookback = 24h;
let WindowMin = 60m;
let SysvolDrops = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
    | where TargetFilePath has_any (@"\SYSVOL\", @"\Policies\{", @"\Machine\Scripts\", @"\Machine\Preferences\ScheduledTasks")
    | where (TargetFileName endswith ".ps1" or TargetFileName endswith ".bat" or TargetFileName endswith ".cmd"
          or TargetFileName endswith ".exe" or TargetFileName =~ "ScheduledTasks.xml" or TargetFileName =~ "scripts.ini")
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DC = DvcHostname, GpoActor = ActorUsername,
              DropFile = TargetFileName, DropPath = TargetFilePath, DropSha = TargetFileSHA256
    | extend _key = 1;
let FanOut = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where ParentProcessName in~ ("svchost.exe","gpscript.exe","taskhostw.exe","services.exe")
    | where TargetProcessName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe")
         or TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("BiBi","No-Justice","karma","Homeland-Justice","Homeland Justice","wiper")
    | project ExecTime = TimeGenerated, ExecHost = DvcHostname, ChildBin = TargetProcessName, ChildCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine
    | extend _key = 1;
SysvolDrops
| join kind=inner FanOut on _key
| where ExecTime between (DropTime .. DropTime + WindowMin)
| summarize
    AffectedHosts = dcount(ExecHost),
    FirstExec = min(ExecTime),
    SampleHosts = make_set(ExecHost, 25),
    SampleChildBin = make_set(ChildBin, 5),
    SampleChildCmd = any(ChildCmd)
    by DC, GpoActor, DropFile, DropPath, DropSha, DropTime
| where AffectedHosts >= 5
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.rationale: Generic GPO-modification rules surface every legitimate admin patch deployment. This rule is tied to VOID MANTICORE specifically because (a) the actor is documented to use GPO-via-SYSVOL as the wiper distribution mechanism in both the Albania (Homeland Justice / No-Justice / 2022) and Israel (Handala / BiBi / 2024) operations — Check Point and Microsoft both call it the cluster's signature destruc
